ddls:
CREATE TABLE "meteorites" (
  "meteorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meteorite */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the meteorite */,
  "id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the meteorite */,
  "nametype" TEXT /* Type of the meteorite name */,
  "recclass" TEXT /* Classification of the meteorite */,
  "mass" REAL /* Mass of the meteorite in grams */,
  "fall" TEXT /* Type of the meteorite fall */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year when the meteorite fell */,
  "reclat" REAL /* Latitude of the meteorite landing site */,
  "reclong" REAL /* Longitude of the meteorite landing site */,
  "chemical_composition" TEXT /* Chemical composition of the meteorite */,
  "discovery_date" TEXT /* Date when the meteorite was discovered */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the meteorite record was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the meteorite */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the meteorite's class */,
  "mass_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the meteorite's mass unit */,
  "fall_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the meteorite's fall type */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the year the meteorite fell */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the meteorite's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meteorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meteorites_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meteorites_mass_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("mass_unit_id") REFERENCES mass_units ("mass_unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meteorites_fall_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fall_type_id") REFERENCES fall_types ("fall_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meteorites_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meteorites_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "parent_class" TEXT /* Parent class if the class is a sub-class */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the class was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mass_units" (
  "mass_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mass unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the mass unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mass unit */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to grams */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mass_unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fall_types" (
  "fall_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fall type */,
  "fall_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the fall type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fall type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the fall type was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fall_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year when the meteorite fell */,
  "year_description" TEXT /* Additional information about the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the researcher */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the researcher was added to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meteorite_researchers" (
  "meteorite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meteorite */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the meteorite study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the researcher started working on the meteorite */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the researcher stopped working on the meteorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meteorite_id", "researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "meteorite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meteorite */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the note was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_meteorite_id FOREIGN KEY ("meteorite_id") REFERENCES meteorites ("meteorite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "meteorite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meteorite */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute that changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the attribute */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the attribute */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_histories_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_histories_meteorite_id FOREIGN KEY ("meteorite_id") REFERENCES meteorites ("meteorite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the meteorite was found */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the country */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the location was added to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)
